gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Examination AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TG < 200 AND T1.Symptoms IS NOT NULL
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) 
FROM Laboratory AS T1 
JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID 
WHERE T1.TG < 200 AND T2."Symptoms" IS NOT NULL;
question: Among the patients with the normal level of triglyceride, how many of them have other symptoms observed?
